sys_script_client.description: This client script sets the Default Primary Assignee when the Primary Assignee is blank and the Assigned Member changes. Updated to also check the assigned member out of office array and set the info message if the user is out of office. 2.8.1 | 2022-09-21| raj | STRY0130635 - Task Form- Assignee is Out of Office 2.8.0 | 2021-11-26 | raj | DFCT0011028 - When users are in TWO or more OUs assigning a task to them forces the "Primary Assignee" to change to their DEFAULT OU 2.7.1 | 2021-11-26 | raj | STRY0114396 - Task Forms- Primary Assignee- Add new constraint logic
sys_script_client.name: Task - onChange - Assigned Member
